purpose: Football Truth must collect season-scoped coverage, not only whichever standings table is visible today.

requiredCoverageLanes.purpose: Scheduling refreshes and avoiding blind daily checks for inactive/completed leagues

hardRules: Do not treat zero-row new season tables as usable previous-season statistics.
Do not overwrite previous completed season standings with new empty tables.
A future/new season table with all zeroes is start-date evidence only if paired with an official date or fixture evidence.
Completed or inactive leagues must carry nextSeasonStartDate or unresolved reason.
Source-family routes must declare which season scope they are extracting.
Coverage is counted only after expected-row and arithmetic gates pass for standings rows.
Start dates require official fixture/schedule/competition evidence, not inference from table existence.
